commands.review_summary:
The branch requires structured `heartbeat_respond` delivery for heartbeat-tool mode, adds SecretRef provider catalog auth handling, changes git no-update installer behavior, refreshes managed peer pins, and adds focused tests plus changelog entries.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main is source-reproducible because heartbeat-tool mode still accepts ordinary reply payload delivery when no structured heartbeat response exists; the installer regression is also clear from the PR diff path, though I did not run live channel proof.
